steps.title: Key insight: f must be constant
steps.content: Since $f(0)=17$ and $f(1)=17$, the two known points are $(0,17)$ and $(1,17)$. The slope is $$m=\frac{17-17}{1-0}=0,$$ so the function is constant: $f(x)=17$.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice C (17)
steps.content:
Testing choice C: $$f(x) = 17$$
Then $$f(0) = 17$$ and $$f(1) = 17$$, which exactly match both given conditions. ✓

That matches choice C — C is correct.
